parameters.query:
SET LOCAL app.current_tenant_id = '{{ $json.body.tenantId }}';
SELECT a.id AS appointment_id, a.customer_phone, a.service_type, a.scheduled_at, a.duration_minutes,
  t.shop_name, t.timezone, tpn.phone_number AS our_phone,
  tct.refresh_token, tct.calendar_id
FROM appointments a
JOIN tenants t ON t.id = a.tenant_id
JOIN tenant_phone_numbers tpn ON tpn.tenant_id = a.tenant_id AND tpn.status = 'active'
LEFT JOIN tenant_calendar_tokens tct ON tct.tenant_id = a.tenant_id
WHERE a.id = '{{ $json.body.appointmentId }}'::uuid AND a.tenant_id = '{{ $json.body.tenantId }}'::uuid;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ summary: $json.eventSummary, description: $json.eventDescription, start: { dateTime: $json.scheduledAt, timeZone: $json.tz }, end: { dateTime: $json.endAt, timeZone: $json.tz } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, calendarSynced: $('Code: Build Confirmation SMS').first().json.calendarSynced, googleEventId: $('Code: Build Confirmation SMS').first().json.googleEventId }) }}
